hero.subtitle: Japan, at your table.
hero.description: Seafood, wagyu, and seasonal produce flown from Japan, prepared with the precision and restraint of authentic Japanese cuisine — an intimate counter for those who recognise the difference.

tatlerAwards.title: A Masterclass in Japanese Gastronomy
tatlerAwards.description: Luxury and comfort meet in every detail, creating a refined and immersive dining experience.

artOfIngredient.title:
ART OF
INGREDIENT
artOfIngredient.description: Our seasonal selections change with nature's rhythm. Each dish showcases ingredients at their peak, crafted with the essence of Japan's bounty.

sakeSection.title:
THE STORY
SAKE PERFORMS
sakeSection.description: Every bottle in our collection carries the essence of its brewery, the season, and the craft. Carefully selected, each sake harmonizes with your meal, creating a flowing, unforgettable experience from the first sip to the last

quietExperience.title: A QUIET, INTIMATE EXPERIENCE
quietExperience.description: Step into a serene space where every detail is designed for calm and connection. Here, the seasons unfold gently on each plate, and every moment is meant to be savored in quiet elegance.

membership.title:
More Than a Card.
It's an Invitation.
membership.description: A symbol of access to Daimasu's most sought-after experiences—priority reservations, exclusive privileges, and elevated dining moments reserved for members.

location.title: Our Location
location.address:
Ground Floor Allegro Center,
Chino Roces Ave, Brgy Magallanes 1232
